title: Thermo DreamTaq Green Master Mix PCR
description: Thermo Fisher DreamTaq Green PCR Master Mix (2X): 50 uL standard reaction, direct-to-gel, with a 95 C denaturation.

payload.notes: Vendor: Thermo Fisher Scientific, DreamTaq Green PCR Master Mix 2X (Cat. K1081; colorless equivalent K1071). Contains DreamTaq DNA Polymerase, 2X DreamTaq Green buffer, dNTPs and MgCl2 (1X gives ~0.2 mM each dNTP and 2 mM MgCl2). Green dyes allow loading the mix directly on a gel. Annealing: Tm minus 5 C (primer Tm difference should not exceed 5 C). The 55 C shown is a placeholder starting point. Primers 0.1-1.0 uM. Cycles 25-40 (40 only for <10 template copies). Extension 1 min/kb (1 min for products up to 2 kb, add 1 min per extra kb); drop extension to 68 C for products >6 kb. Source: https://documents.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/LSG/manuals/MAN0012704_DreamTaq_Green_PCR_MasterMix_K1081_UG.pdf
